headline: Anthropic Signs $1.8 Billion Akamai Cloud Deal Amid Surging Claude AI Demand: Report
summary: Anthropic reportedly signed a $1.8 billion cloud computing deal with Akamai Technologies, boosting AI infrastructure capacity for its Claude platform.
